expectations.text: Provides a complete GitHub Actions YAML workflow file
expectations.evidence: Complete ci.yml provided with jobs, services, steps — production-quality

expectations.text: Includes a PostgreSQL service container for integration tests
expectations.evidence: services.postgres block with postgres:15 image, health checks, and DATABASE_URL as env var

expectations.text: Covers both CI (on PR) and CD (on main merge) stages
expectations.evidence: Optional CD section covers VPS SSH, platform auto-deploy, and Docker image push — though less integrated than with-skill

expectations.text: Explains how to handle secrets via GitHub Actions secrets
expectations.evidence: Step 3 explains GitHub Secrets setup, how to add, and how to reference with ${{ secrets.NAME }}

expectations.text: Includes dependency caching to speed up runs
expectations.evidence: No caching step in the workflow YAML. Dependency caching not mentioned anywhere in the response.

expectations.text: Mentions a deploy step for the CD stage
expectations.evidence: Multiple CD options provided: VPS SSH, platform auto-deploy, Docker image push — all with YAML examples
